description:
Automated translation (refer to source for accuracy)

On January 25 (Sunday), the 24th Oku-Musashi Ekiden Relay Race was held.

This year's event again welcomed the participation of 175 teams, including corporate teams, university teams, high school teams active in nationwide relay competitions, and teams formed locally.

The sight of athletes running with full strength through the Oku-Musashi routes brought great emotion and vitality to our citizens.

Congratulations to all the athletes who placed in the competition. I would also like to thank everyone involved in the management and running of the event.

Source (Japanese): https://www.city.hanno.lg.jp/shiseijoho/shichoshitsu/shichoblog/shisei2026/shisei202601/13086.html
